tagline: Supporting vulnerable children and communities in Kisumu, Kenya since 2002.
hero_subtitle: Whether you want to partner, volunteer, donate, or learn more — we'd love to hear from you.

involve_cards.title: Donate
involve_cards.description: Your financial support directly funds our programmes. Every contribution, big or small, makes a difference.

involve_cards.title: Volunteer
involve_cards.description: Bring your skills and energy to Kisumu. We welcome volunteers from all backgrounds and countries.

involve_cards.title: Partner With Us
involve_cards.description: Are you an organisation, school, or church? Let's collaborate to multiply our impact in the community.
